winner_note: Game 1 = the t=80..620 segment (bounded by the 'Happy settling' resets). Per spec §5.1 the winner is read from the victory LOG line ('X won the game!') ONLY; a resign/concession or a video cutoff before 15 VP yields winner=null and the game is excluded from the scoreboard (board+openings kept for seeds). Inside game 1's window the terminal log (spike scan_60_1200.json t=600) reads 'rayman147 built a Settlement (+1 VP)' then 'ThePhantom: gg' (ThePhantom conceding) alongside the end-screen side panel (Replay/Share/Resource Stats/Map). A '+1 VP' settlement line and a 'gg' are NOT the victory line. There is NO 'won the game!' line anywhere in t=80..620 (verified programmatically against scan_60_1200.json); the only 'ThePhantom won the gamel' line (scan t=1160) belongs to the NEXT game (the t=620..1180 segment). So game 1 ended by CONCESSION with no logged victory line => winner=null, scoreboard-INELIGIBLE. Deriving winner='rayman147' (or 'ThePhantom') from the '+1 VP' precursor or the 'gg' would inject a fabricated outcome into the opening-calibration scoreboard.
resnap_note: openings RE-SNAPPED under the locked desert=11 affine (orient_lock2 PART A screen rule, refl=1 rot=0, screen-penalty gap 43.5x, resid 0.77px). The earlier desert=17 IDs (TP s[4,10] r[7,20]; ray s[20,0] r[34,2]) were snapped under a REJECTED D6 orientation and were physically wrong. All 8 re-snapped pieces verified on tests/fixtures/human_data/game1_resnap_overlay.png (snap err <0.35px, owner colours confirmed: v1/v19=BLACK=ThePhantom, v3/v11=GREEN=rayman147).
placement_order_note: ADDITIVE metadata (step6 §3.1 placement-order contract) — the 'openings' block above stays in the order-blind CV-detection order (unchanged IDs, asserted by test_golden_fixtures_exist_and_load). The openings CV reads a single post-setup frame with no placement order; order is recovered from the log's setup-event sequence ('log_setup_sequence' above) + the grant glyph. From the snake draft the grant follows each player's 2nd settlement, and the granted-card multiset pins WHICH vertex that is: ThePhantom received SHEEP/ORE/ORE == the adjacency of v19 (so 1st=v1, 2nd/granting=v19); rayman147 received WHEAT/WOOD/BRICK == the adjacency of v11 (so 1st=v3, 2nd/granting=v11) — the hand-verified game-1 grants (test_orientation.test_glyph_anchor_accepts_correct_grants). roads[i] is the setup road incident to settlements[i]. 'placement_order' below is the resulting log-placement-ordered tuples (settlements[1] == the resource-granting settlement); it round-trips through catan_rl.human_data.orientation.establish_placement_order (test_placement_order.test_golden_game1_round_trips_with_order_established).
